event.title: FSFE at the OggCamp 2026, Manchester, United Kingdom

body.p: OggCamp is an unconference celebrating Free Culture, Free and Open Source Software, hardware hacking, digital rights, and all manner of collaborative cultural activities and is committed to creating a conference that is as inclusive as possible.
There will be two talks related to the FSFE and it's current activities:

ul.li: On the first day, 25.04 from 11:30 till 11:55 Ana Galan will be presenting "Why I am a tech illiterate, but I care about Free Software"!
On the second day of OggCamp, 26.04 from 10:30 till 10:55 (UTC), Bonnie Mehring will be presenting "Hands on: How to engage Gen Z and Alpha to Free Software"!

body.p: Step by and meet Ana and Bonnie from the Free Software Foundation Europe at OggCamp in Manchester from the 25. to the 26. April. Registration for the OggCamp is mandatory.
